entries.target: Click Shrani Centre Nastavitev to persist roster, izpitiners, assignments, variants, and uvozied tests.

entries.source: Copy unavailable. Select and copy {label} QR link manually.
entries.target: Copy unavailable. Select and copy {label} QR link manually.

entries.target: Uvozi CSV or JSON paket with real tests. The selected variant is then shown to kandidats.

entries.source: CSV columns: variantCode, level, language, questionId, type, points, text, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, correctAnswer. JSON format: { "variants": [...], "questions": { "VARIANT_CODE": [...] } }.
entries.target: CSV columns: variantCode, level, jezik, vprašanjeId, type, points, besedilo, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, correctOdgovor. JSON format: { "variants": [...], "vprašanjes": { "VARIANT_CODE": [...] } }.

entries.target: Pilot workflow status across nastavitev, assignments, kandidat sekcijas, responses, poročilo drafts and outdoor scoring.

entries.target: Use the sync queue panel to review sync status after smoke test.

entries.target: This session uses demo fallback data for testing only. Naloži Centre Nastavitev to use backend-naložied pilot data; counts may reflect demo fallback state until then.

entries.target: Allow camera access and point the tablet at a VetBara QR.

entries.target: Admin sets centre, date, place and izpit jezik, then sends centre access QR.

entries.source: Structured source of four examination documents. Questions, sections, scoring and examiner guidance are edited here and saved as the final examination package.
entries.target: Structured source of four izpitination documents. Vprašanjes, sekcijas, scoring and izpitiner guidance are edited here and shranid as the final izpitination paket.

entries.target: Edit the four source izpitination documents. These data create the izpitination paket for the system and the print/PDF document version.

entries.source: Use latest package from Admin workflow
entries.target: Use latest paket from Admin workflow

entries.source: These tools are mainly for migration, backups and technical checks. For routine exam preparation, use the main buttons above.
entries.target: These tools are mainly for migration, backups and technical checks. For routine izpit preparation, use the main buttons above.

entries.source: Edit the preface, candidate introduction, sections and questions. This structure is the source for the JSON package and print/PDF.
entries.target: Edit the preface, kandidat introduction, sekcijas and vprašanjes. This structure is the source for the JSON paket and print/PDF.

entries.source: Sections are created from the Section field in individual questions.
entries.target: Sekcijas are created from the Sekcija field in individual vprašanjes.

entries.source: This document has no items yet.
This section has no items yet.
No active package is loaded. Use Load .vet or create a new package.
entries.target: No active paket is naložied. Use Naloži .vet or create a new paket.

entries.target: Možnosti, ena v vrstici, npr. A. ...

entries.source: Examiner help / correct answer / scoring guidance
entries.target: Izpitiner help / correct odgovor / scoring guidance

entries.source: The administrator sets the certification centre, date, place and examination language, then sends the Centre access link / QR.
entries.target: The administrator sets the certification centre, date, place and izpitination jezik, then sends the Centre access link / QR.

entries.source: User interface translations are managed here. Examination content translation is controlled by the package created in section A.
entries.target: User interface translations are managed here. Izpitination content translation is controlled by the paket created in sekcija A.

entries.source: UI translations are managed separately from exam content.
entries.target: UI translations are managed separately from izpit content.

entries.target: Naložied stored test paket with {variants} variant(s) and {vprašanjes} vprašanje(s).

entries.source: The Centre Audit Package requires a valid Centre session. Reopen the Centre QR and try again.
entries.target: The Centre Audit Paket requires a valid Centre session. Reodpri the Centre QR and try again.

entries.source: Translation management applies only to the application interface. Exam content comes from the Admin package and must not be changed by UX language.
entries.target: Translation management applies only to the application interface. Izpit content comes from the Admin paket and must not be changed by UX jezik.

entries.target: Every interface term is stored here with its key, English source, trenutno UI translation and conbesedilo for Admin review.

entries.target: Uvozi UI translations into the trenutnoly selected interface jezik. The file may be CSV izvozied from this table or a flat JSON dictionary.

entries.target: Uvoziing translations for {jezik} (from the system setting). Overwrite the trenutno interface?

entries.target: Translations were uvozied. Renaložiing the interface.

entries.source: Translation import failed. Check the file format.
entries.target: Translation uvozi failed. Check the file format.

entries.source: Generate the centre link only when the package is ready and the exam is open.
entries.target: Generate the centre link only when the paket is pripravljeno and the izpit is odpri.

entries.target: Certification PDFs are converted into a local JSON paket. The application UX jezik does not change the jezik or content of izpit documents.

entries.target: Naloži the .vet paket sent by Admin. The paket sets the content of tests and forms for further izpit preparation.

entries.target: Naloži paket .vet, ki ga je poslal Admin

entries.target: This step sets the trenutno izpit content for the centre. Levels and variants are taken directly from the paket.

entries.source: Load the .vet package sent by Admin
entries.target: Naloži paket .vet, ki ga je poslal Admin

entries.source: Select VetBara Package 1. The package contains rules, tests and forms for the outdoor session in the relevant language.
entries.target: Select VetBara Paket 1. The paket contains rules, tests and forms for the outdoor session in the relevant jezik.

entries.source: The package does not contain Package 1 data.
entries.target: The paket does not contain Paket 1 data.

entries.source: Service options for audit, manual import of older packages and operational checks. A normal exam run usually does not need them.
entries.target: Service options for audit, manual uvozi of older pakets and operational checks. A normal izpit run usually does not need them.

entries.target: Preparation of the field part of the izpit: test centre, physical drevos, Practicing/Consulting A-D assignments, Practicing A data, validacija and kandidat izvozis.

entries.target: Manage kandidats, izpitiners and primary/secondary izpitiner assignments. Kandidat and izpitiner lists use the same type of edit cards.

entries.target: Field map paket is stored on this tablet.

entries.source: If the backend or internet does not work, upload the JSON package exported from the Candidate portal here.
entries.target: If the backend or internet does not work, upnaloži the JSON paket izvozied from the Kandidat portal here.

entries.target: QR links for kandidats and izpitiners, readiness checks and operational izpit overview.

entries.target: Summary of individual kandidat results. Result editing takes place in the Izpitiner interface after clicking the relevant result.
